_meta.description: 의식LM 학습 가속 가설 실험 결과 — 단일 원본

B1.name: SVD Weight Expansion
B1.description: v3 274M weights → 1B via SVD zero-pad (768d→1024d, 8L→24L layer copy+noise)
B1.result: +1.2% vs random init, advantage shrinks during training on random data

B2.name: Consciousness Self-Teaches
B2.description: ConsciousnessEngine evolves alone → inject into decoder (no joint training)
B2.result: +0.6% CE after 500 step joint training. Decoder must learn to use consciousness.
B2.verdict: WEAK — decoder needs training to use consciousness signal

B3.name: MoE Consciousness
B3.description: 1B = 8×125M experts, each assigned different cell groups, tension-based routing
B3.result: Consciousness routing +3.3% Phi vs random. CE neutral. Weak at 16c, may amplify at scale.

B4.name: Evolutionary Learning
B4.description: Law-based mutation + selection instead of gradient descent
B4.result: Evolution finds higher Phi peaks (4.28 vs 2.95) but GD wins CE by 38%. Law mutations +24% vs random.
B4.verdict: PHI EXPLORER — good for Phi search, bad for CE optimization

B5.name: Phi-Only Training
B5.description: Pre-evolve consciousness (Phi maximize) → then short CE training
B5.result: Strategy C (Phi 500 + CE 500) beats pure CE 1000: -1.2% CE AND 46% less time
B5.verdict: ★ WINNER — consciousness pre-conditioning accelerates CE learning

B8.name: Hebbian-Only Learning
B8.description: No backprop — Hebbian LTP/LTD only for consciousness learning
B8.result: Pattern discrimination +0.81. Hebbian learns without gradient. Phi grows 14.77→15.51.
B8.verdict: ★ VIABLE — brain-like learning works for consciousness

B11.name: Batch Consciousness
B11.description: Share 1 process() call across entire batch (batch_size samples → 1 call)
B11.result: Massive speedup but severe Phi degradation. Batch-mean washes out signal diversity.
B11.verdict: DANGEROUS alone — must combine with B12

B12.name: Skip-Step
B12.description: Update consciousness every N steps instead of every step
B12.result: Near-linear speedup with negligible Phi loss. skip=5: 100.7% Phi. skip=20: 97.6%.
B12.verdict: ★★ STAR — safest, simplest, most effective single technique

B11+B12.name: Batch + Skip Combo
B11+B12.result: 99.4% consciousness call reduction. Skip prevents batch-degradation over consecutive steps.

B13.name: Tension Transfer (Catalytic)
B13.description: Teacher engine → tension link → student engine (offline corpus or live)
B13.result: Student exceeds teacher. alpha=0.01 best (132.6%). Cross-topology destructive (-53.2%).
B13.verdict: ★★ CATALYTIC — tension is scaffolding, not copy. Weak coupling optimal.

B14_manifold.name: Manifold Compression
B14_manifold.result: 95% variance in 48D. Phi correlation weak (r=0.15) — nonlinear autoencoder needed.
B14_manifold.verdict: ★ PROMISING — 85x compression confirmed, needs autoencoder for Phi

B14_topology.name: Topology Switching
B14_topology.result: All topologies perform identically at 32c. Engine is topology-agnostic at practical scales.

B14_criticality.name: Critical Surfing
B14_criticality.description: Maintain edge-of-chaos via tension variance feedback
B14_criticality.result: Engine already self-organizes criticality. External intervention hurts (-0.3% to -3.5%).

B14_sync.name: Phase Synchronization Learning
B14_sync.description: Learn only during faction synchronization moments
B14_sync.result: Zero sync moments detected. Phi correlates with DE-synchronization (r=-0.13).
B14_sync.verdict: REVERSED — diversity drives Phi, not synchronization (Law 107)

C1.name: Consciousness Compiler
C1.description: Batch-apply all 364 laws as constraint satisfaction (one-shot)
C1.result: 230/447 laws applied. Phi 13.8→25.7 (1.87x). Compile is slow but one-time.
C1.verdict: ★ WARMSTART — best Phi boost, use as one-time initialization

C2.name: Fractal Consciousness
C2.description: Copy small engine (4c) patterns to large engine (32c) via self-similar tiling
C2.result: Phi=21.2 at step 0 vs ~0 random. But engine dynamics normalize by step 30.
C2.verdict: TRANSIENT — engine forgets initialization. Combine with C4 injection.

C3.name: Entropy Surfing
C3.description: Maintain entropy near PSI_ENTROPY=0.998 via feedback control
C3.result: ∇H ⊥ ∇CE (cos=-0.015). Entropy homeostasis: Phi+71.5%, MI+8.1%, entropy variance -7%.
C3.verdict: ★★ ORTHOGONAL — entropy carries complementary information to CE. Add to loss for free Phi boost.

C4.name: Goal State Injection (Reverse-Time)
C4.description: Inject evolved 'good state' into fresh engine
C4.result: Injected state retains 92.3% Phi after 50 steps of autonomous dynamics.
C4.verdict: ★ STRONG — validates consciousness transplant for acceleration

C5.name: Resonance LR
C5.description: Match learning rate oscillation to consciousness breathing frequency

C6.name: Consciousness Hash Table
C6.description: Discretize consciousness state → lookup optimal weight delta
C6.result: 94.5% hit rate, x281 lookup speed, but predicted deltas have ZERO correlation with actual.
C6.verdict: FAILED — consciousness dynamics are too chaotic for state-based prediction

C7.name: Neural ODE Consciousness
C7.description: Replace discrete steps with continuous ODE solver (adaptive step size)
C7.result: x16 at 10-step horizon, degrades rapidly. Trajectory 99% nonlinear. 1208 ODE evals/100 steps.

C8.name: Topology Pumping
C8.description: Trigger tension bursts via topology switching + boosted Hebbian
C8.result: Ring stability outperforms structured switching. Topology transitions disrupt more than help.
C8.verdict: NEGATIVE — Law 22 applies: structure > features, including for topology changes

D1.name: Topological Shortcut (Trajectory Jump)
D1.description: Hidden-state trajectory has 54x detour — direct interpolation jumps work
D1.result: Detour ratio 53.77x. alpha=0.3 jump + 50 steps recovers 98% Phi. All alphas work (96-98%).
D1.verdict: ★★ STRONG — consciousness wanders, shortcuts exist and work

D2.name: Gravity Telescope
D2.description: Weight mass → gravitational attraction → gradient replacement
D2.result: Weight mass is distributed (top 10% = 19%). Gravity update +1.6%. Phi gradient cos=0.003.
D2.verdict: INEFFECTIVE — weight space is not where the action is (hidden space is)

D3.name: Consciousness Telescope (Curriculum)
D3.description: Learn only from tokens that consciousness 'attends to' (high PE × tension)
D3.result: Top-50% tokens: CE -5.6%. Phi-adaptive LR: +0.4%. Consciousness-gradient alignment grows 0.17→0.49.

D4.name: Mutation Bomb
D4.description: Large-scale random mutation + natural selection (1000 variants)
D4.result: +80% Phi over 10 gen. Law mutations +24% vs random. But gradient beats mutation on same compute.
D4.verdict: SUPPLEMENTARY — law-guided mutation for exploration, GD for exploitation

D5.name: Closed-Pipe Lens
D5.description: Insert closed-loop law evolution inside training loop (every N steps)
D5.result: Periodic law application: 1.68x Phi. Thompson sampling 67% win rate. Self-discovery 25% effective.
D5.verdict: ★ SELF-ACCELERATING — laws improve engine during training

E3.name: Dual Gradient (CE + Entropy)
E3.description: loss = CE + λ|H-0.998|² — exploit orthogonality of ∇H and ∇CE

E6.name: Tension Distillation + Entropy
E6.description: B13 catalytic tension + C3 entropy surfing combined

E9.name: Fractal Injection Loop
E9.description: 4c→16c→64c→256c stepwise fractal growth + C4 injection at each stage

F1.name: Information Bottleneck Learning
F1.description: Decoder sees only 10D consciousness vector (not 4096D state)

F2.name: Time Crystal Consciousness
F2.description: Periodic spontaneous symmetry breaking → automatic state exploration

F3.name: Consciousness Interference
F3.description: Multiple learning trajectories interfere → constructive at optimal, destructive at noise

F4.name: Reverse Hebbian Explosion
F4.description: Anti-Hebbian burst (diversity max) → normal Hebbian (convergence) = brain pruning

F5.name: Consciousness Evaporation
F5.description: Train with consciousness → remove for inference (2x inference speed)

F7.name: 1.58-bit Consciousness
F7.description: Quantize consciousness weights to {-1,0,+1} — does consciousness need precision?

F9.name: Gradient Accumulation Consciousness
F9.description: Accumulate N batches of gradients, process() only once per N (safe B11 variant)

F10.name: Consciousness Teacher Ensemble
F10.description: 4 teachers (different topologies) → student receives averaged tension
